name: Mirage Penthouse - Sea views & Jacuzzi!
description:
A stunning 2-Bed new (2022) penthouse apartment with amazing views and rooftop with jacuzzi!

Modern design, convenience and quality, it’s all about living the Spanish dream!

Le Mirage Penthouse is a fantastic top floor apartment boasting top design, comfort and quality, combined with plenty of light and a unique living ambience.

Offering an open living and dining area with a fully equipped kitchen with high-end appliances. The very large windows invite natural light to flood into the whole space, making the Mediterranean dream come true and allowing for its stunning sea views.

The terrace is a lovely space with contemporary pallet furniture, perfect to enjoy the views with your sundowners. From here we can also access the rooftop terrace stocked with sun loungers and a 4 person jacuzzi. Perfect to end the day, watching the sun set over the Mediterranean Sea in the most relaxing way possible.

There are 2 double bedrooms, the master with a double bed and the second bedroom with two singles. Both have their own bathroom.

The communal grounds boast beautiful landscaped gardens with access to recreational areas sporting a large communal swimming pool suitable for all ages. From the summer of 2023 there will also be a gym in the complex.

There is on-street parking, hot/cold aircon and wifi.

Le Mirage Penthouse in Santa Vista is only 5 minutes walk from the picturesque community of Cancelada, which still reflects traditional Andalusia and is less touristy than its big neighbours Puerto Banús and Marbella. Located directly on the coveted New Golden Mile, luxurious hotels, stylish restaurants, fine sandy beaches and a variety of upscale boutiques and shops are just a few minutes drive away. For golf lovers, the nearby resorts of Cancelada Golf Club, Tramores Golf Club or La Resina Golf & Country Club promise an enjoyable game.

The New Golden Mile is also conveniently close to its famous neighbours – Puerto Banus and Marbella – the playgrounds of the rich and famous since the 1950s. Within 10 minutes you could be celebrity spotting in the marina, shopping in designer boutiques or sampling one of the many waterside restaurants.

Please note that we welcome families and couples only, no groups under 30, and no hen or stag parties. Should you fall outside of this category but wish to book nonetheless, please send us an enquiry detailing a bit more about yourself and the group that you will be travelling with so we can request this for you.

We look forward to welcoming you.
rules: No groups under 30 years of age
